title: Dancera hirta
taxonomy: Dancera hirta is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The exact classification of Dancera hirta is not well-documented, but it is likely to be a member of the Rubus genus, which includes species of brambles and raspberries. However, without more information, it is difficult to pinpoint its exact classification within the Rubiaceae family. Further research is needed to confirm the classification of Dancera hirta. It may be a rare or newly discovered species.
